history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young woman with long, dark brown hair is seen from behind, looking out at a breathtaking mountain landscape. She is wearing a black jacket. Her hair cascades down her back, with strands catching the light. In the foreground, lush green foliage frames the scene, with some branches extending into the frame.

The middle ground reveals a dramatic vista of rolling mountains partially obscured by a thick blanket of white clouds. A prominent, dark, conical mountain peak emerges majestically from the clouds in the distance, its slopes silhouetted against a vibrant blue sky. The sky is streaked with thin, wispy white clouds that add texture and depth.

The lighting suggests it is daytime, likely mid-morning or afternoon, with the sun illuminating the scene from above, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the leaves and mountains. The color palette is dominated by the deep blues of the sky, the crisp whites of the clouds, the earthy greens of the vegetation, and the dark tones of the distant mountain.

The overall mood is one of awe, tranquility, and a sense of adventure. The image evokes feelings of peace and the majesty of nature, with the woman as a solitary observer taking in the grand spectacle. The style is realistic, capturing the natural beauty of the mountain environment.
